articles.title: Multibagger penny stock PC Jewellers beats Sensex YTD: Is it a good stock to buy amid rising gold prices?
articles.summary: According to market experts, the move in PC Jeweller reflects a recovery trade rather than sectoral momentum. Investors should look for consistency in cash flows, debt reduction progress and auditor comfort before taking exposure.

articles.title: IPO Tracker: 11 of 32 IPOs this year see tepid listing gains; 60% trade below issue prices
articles.summary: The IPO market in India has slowed in 2026, with only 32 companies listed compared to 50 last year. Post-listing performance has declined, with many stocks trading below issue prices.

articles.title: IPO GMPs: From Gaudium IVF IPO to Omnitech Engineering IPO; here's what GMP hints about the listing gains
articles.summary: Amid a sluggish IPO market, five IPOs stand out this week. Analysts predict a continued pessimistic outlook for 2026 due to past losses. Key active IPOs include Clean Max and Shree Ram Twistex, with their grey market performance showing varying trends ahead of listing.

articles.title: PhonePe vs Paytm: Why does Emkay Global find Paytm shares to offer better risk-reward? Explained
articles.summary: PhonePe IPO DRHP shows that the company reported 238 million monthly active customers (MACs), each transacting an average of 37 times per month. However, this scale of engagement has not yet translated proportionately into revenue.

articles.title: Vedanta board approves funds fundraise of ₹3,000 crore via NCDs; share jumps 5%
articles.summary: Vedanta's share price rose over 5% on February 25 after the board approved a fundraise of ₹3,000 crore through non-convertible debentures (NCDs). The issuance will consist of up to 3,00,000 NCDs at a face value of ₹1,00,000 each.

articles.title: Can the strong order inflow lift ABB’s earnings?
articles.summary: Despite a massive surge in new projects, profit headwinds persist.

articles.title: From IDFC First Bank, Bank of Maharashtra to Eternal— These are the top most traded stocks on the NSE today
articles.summary: Discover the most actively traded stocks on the NSE today, including Vodafone Idea, IDFC First Bank, and Bank of Maharashtra. As market conditions fluctuate, these stocks showcase significant trading volume.

articles.title: SpiceJet share price hits 10% lower circuit after block deal reports. Do you own?
articles.summary: SpiceJet share price slid 10%, hitting the lower circuit in Wednesday’s trading session after reports revealed that 8.4% of its equity shares changed hands in a block deal.

articles.title: Avoid IT stocks amid AI scare, current valuations; banks set for strong growth over 3-5 years: Vikas Gupta, OmniScience
articles.summary: We would suggest caution in selecting defence stocks, said Vikas Gupta, of OmniScience. Any selection process should not focus only on the near term revenue and earnings growth, he added.

articles.title: Bandhan Bank shares extend bull run to fourth day, hit 7-month high. What’s driving the rally?
articles.summary: Bandhan Bank stock climbed 1.3% to ₹182.60, continuing its bull run and achieving a 17% gain in February. Despite a YoY net profit decline, analysts upgraded ratings for the bank, anticipating recovery in operating performance and asset quality.

articles.title: Multibagger IPO: NSE SME-listed cybersecurity stock doubles allottees' money in five months
articles.summary: TechD Cybersecurity doubled investors' funds in five months post-IPO, but shares fell over 12% amid AI replacement concerns. CEO Sunny Vaghela emphasized AI enhances rather than replaces cybersecurity roles, highlighting the importance of human judgment in threat management.

articles.title: 4650% surge in five years! Multibagger EV stock jumps 8.5% following relief rally on Dalal Street
articles.summary: Mercury Ev-Tech's stock surged 8.5% on February 25, reaching ₹35.55, though it remains 54% below its 52-week high. The company reported Q3 net sales of ₹25.29 crore and a profit of ₹0.89 crore, with FIIs increasing their stake to 2.68%.

articles.title: Gaudium IVF IPO Allotment LIVE: Check GMP, allotment status on BSE, NSE and Bigshare Services
articles.summary: Gaudium IVF IPO Allotment LIVE: Gaudium IVF IPO allotment status online check can be done through the websites of BSE, NSE, and the IPO registrar. Bigshare Services is the Gaudium IVF & Women Health IPO registrar.

articles.title: Angel One Stock Split: Brokerage firm declares February 26 as record date for 1:10 split; do you own?
articles.summary: Angel One's stock split on February 26 will not change ownership percentages. For Q3 FY26, the firm reported a 4.5% decline in profit to ₹269 crore, despite a 5.8% rise in total income. The split aims to increase liquidity by converting one share into ten.

articles.title: Mukul Agrawal, Sunil Singhania-backed Yaap Digital IPO sails through in 30 mins — Check GMP and other details
articles.summary: Yaap Digital IPO opened on February 25, looking to raise ₹80 crore. The offer involves a fresh sale of 0.55 crore shares. Investors can apply for lots of 1000 shares, with funds aimed at acquisitions and establishing an AI-led content hub.

articles.title: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions IPO: Check GMP, subscription status, and key details - Should you apply on final day?
articles.summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions' IPO, aimed at raising ₹3,100 crore, saw weak demand, being only 46% subscribed by Day 3. The grey market premium indicates a likely listing price of ₹1,050, slightly below the issue price.

articles.title: Shree Ram Twistex IPO day 3: GMP, subscription status, review, other details. Apply or not?
articles.summary: Shree Ram Twistex IPO GMP: According to experts, shares of the company are available at a premium of ₹9 in the grey market today

articles.title: Stocks to buy: Sagar Doshi suggests Chennai Petroleum, Colgate Palmolive, JSW Steel shares to buy
articles.summary: Benchmark indices bounced back on February 25, with Nifty 50 gaining 0.35% and Sensex up 0.37%. Precious metals rose in price. Analysts suggest potential resistance for Nifty 50 at 25,700, while Bank Nifty shows strength despite a minor breakdown in hourly charts.

articles.title: Yashhtej Industries share price off to a weak start, lists at 25% discount to IPO price
articles.summary: Yashhtej Industries share price opened at ₹88 apiece on BSE SME. This means that the IPO allottees lost 25% over the Yashhtej Industries IPO listing.

articles.title: Sensex jumps over 700 points, Nifty 50 reclaims 25,650— 5 key factors that are dominating Indian stock market today
articles.summary: The Sensex jumped over 700 points to an intraday high of 82,958, while the Nifty 50 reclaimed the 25,650 mark, rising by almost 1%. Mid and small-cap indices also rose. Investors got richer by ₹3 lakh crore in a session.

articles.title: Infosys, TCS, Mphasis to Coforge: Indian IT stocks jump up to 4% as global tech stocks rally on Anthropic comments
articles.summary: Mphasis, Infosys, LTIMindtree, HCL Technologies and Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) were the top gainers on the Nifty IT index. All the index constituents rose in the range of 2%-4%.

articles.title: Waaree Energies, Premier shares slump up to 15% after reports of US setting Indian solar import duty at 126%
articles.summary: Shares of Waaree Energies, Premier Energies, and Vikram Solar fell by up to 15% on February 25 due to preliminary tariffs of 126% on Indian solar imports announced by the Trump administration, as per reports.

articles.title: Shree Ram Twistex IPO Day 3 LIVE: GMP jumps to 13%! Issue booked 23.79x so far — Should you apply?
articles.summary: Shree Ram Twistex IPO Day 3 LIVE: Shree Ram Twistex IPO GMP today jumped to its highest so far, signalling a listing pop of over 12%. The offer is entirely a fresh share sale of ₹110 crore.

articles.title: Canara Bank share price gains 1% after lender announces ₹5,000 crore bond issue; check details
articles.summary: Canara Bank plans to raise up to ₹5,000 crore by issuing Tier 2 bonds to enhance capital adequacy and support growth. The bond issue, compliant with Basel III, will launch on February 26, 2026, with a base size of ₹2,000 crore and an option for ₹3,000 crore.

articles.title: Clean Max Enviro IPO Day 3 LIVE: Issue booked 72% so far. GMP signals weak trend. Check key dates, review. Apply or not?
articles.summary: Clean Max Enviro IPO Day 3 LIVE: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions IPO price band has been fixed in the range of ₹1,000 to ₹1,053 per equity share of the face value of Re 1. IPO comprises a new issuance of shares totaling ₹1,200 cr, alongside an offer-for-sale of shares valued at ₹1,900 cr.

articles.title: IRFC share price dips 4% as ₹5,430 crore OFS opens: Check floor price, offer size and other details
articles.summary: IRFC OFS: The railway stock opened at ₹105.79 in early morning session today, as compared to ₹109.44 apiece on Tuesday, following the launch of its OFS.

articles.title: Buy or sell: Vaishali Parekh recommends three intraday stocks to buy today — 25 February 2026
articles.summary: Buy or sell: Vaishali Parekh recommends three intraday stocks to buy today — Jamna Auto, Fortis Healthcare, and Amber Enterprises

articles.title: Silver rate today on MCX adds 2.7% to jump over ₹2.67 lakh - More rally on cards?
articles.summary: On February 25, silver prices increased by 2.7% to ₹2,67,990 per kg amid geopolitical tensions and uncertainty over U.S. tariffs. Gold prices also rose, supported by reduced interest rate cut expectations and the reopening of Chinese markets.

articles.title: Gold rate climbs on MCX on increased geopolitical uncertainties, weaker US dollar; key levels to watch
articles.summary: Gold rate climbed on MCX. MCX gold April futures climbed by over ₹1,100, or 0.70%, to ₹1,61,072 per 10 grams, while MCX silver March contracts jumped by over ₹7,200, or nearly 3%, to ₹2,67,990 per kg.

articles.title: Omnitech Engineering IPO Day 1: Issue booked 5% so far. Check GMP, subscription, review, key dates. Apply or not?
articles.summary: Omnitech Engineering IPO opens on February 25, with a price band of ₹216-227 per share. The company raised ₹174 crore from anchor investors and reserves shares for various investor categories. Omnitech Engineering IPO GMP today is +4.

articles.title: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery IPO Day 2: Issue booked 70% so far. Here's GMP, subscription status - Should you apply?
articles.summary: The GMP of PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery IPO has fallen to ₹1.5 from ₹9, according to the markets tracking the grey market.

articles.title: Stock Market Today LIVE: Sensex pares gains, turns flat, Nifty below 25,500; RIL, SBI, ITC drag
articles.summary: Stock Market Today LIVE: Catch live updates on Indian stock market, buzzing stocks, gold, silver, rupee, and more here.

articles.title: Gold Rate Today LIVE: MCX gold price rises above ₹1.6 lakh per 10 gm, MCX silver rate jumps 2% to ₹2.67 lakh per kg
articles.summary: Gold Rate Today LIVE: Gold prices rose as investors flocked to the safe-haven metal amid Trump tariffs uncertainty and US-Iran tensions. Comex silver prices also climbed over 1% to trade above $88 an ounce.

articles.title: Gaudium IVF IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online
articles.summary: Gaudium IVF IPO allotment date is likely today, 25 February 2026. Investors can check Gaudium IVF IPO allotment status online through the websites of BSE and NSE, along with the official portal of the IPO registrar. Bigshare Services is the Gaudium IVF & Women Health IPO registrar.

articles.title: Stocks to watch: IRFC, IDFC First Bank, RVNL among 10 shares in focus today; full list here
articles.summary: Stock market today: The Indian stock market is expected to open higher on Wednesday, driven by positive global market cues, after stabilising from the sharp decline seen in the previous session.
